<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Bosentan (As Monohydrate) 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) to improve exercise capacity and symptoms in patients with World Health Organization (WHO) functional class III. Efficacy has been shown in: ...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>scleroderma (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.8%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>limited systemic sclerosis（99.7%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>localized scleroderma（99.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.5%）</li>
<li>pseudoxanthoma elasticum, forme fruste（99.5%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>elastoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>systemic sclerosis（99.3%）</li>
<li>gout（99.2%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（98.9%）</li>
<li>uterine polyp（98.8%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（98.8%）</li>
<li>epulis（98.8%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（98.8%）</li>
<li>diffuse cutaneous systemic sclerosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>polyp of vocal cord（98.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
